section_miscategorizations.text: X-ray will be ordered to assess the extent of swelling.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a future diagnostic order/plan, not an already performed test or observed result, so it belongs in the Plan section.

section_miscategorizations.text: Rescribe a steroid injection to the right knee.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The intent is a treatment plan, which is correctly in P, but the wording is unclear; if this were meant as a description of a prior treatment rather than a new order, it would belong in S. As written, it is acceptable in P.
